text: Do or do not. There is no try.
source: Star Wars: Episode V - The Empire Strikes Back
context: Emphasizes full commitment over half-hearted attempts; a lesson in decisive action and belief.

text: Fear is the path to the dark side. Fear leads to anger. Anger leads to hate. Hate leads to suffering.
source: Star Wars: Episode I - The Phantom Menace
context: Chain of emotional consequences; insight into how fear corrupts and destroys.

source: Star Wars: Episode VIII - The Last Jedi
context: Reframing failure as essential to growth and wisdom rather than something to be feared or avoided.

text: Train yourself to let go of everything you fear to lose.
source: Star Wars: Episode III - Revenge of the Sith
context: Detachment from fear-driven attachment as the path to peace and the light side.

text: In a dark place we find ourselves, and a little more knowledge lights our way.
source: Star Wars: Episode III - Revenge of the Sith
speech: Yoda Reflecting on the Jedi's Situation
context: Knowledge and understanding as a source of hope and guidance even in desperate times.

text: Size matters not. Look at me. Judge me by my size, do you?
source: Star Wars: Episode V - The Empire Strikes Back
context: True power and capability come from within, not from physical appearance or assumptions.

text: Luminous beings are we, not this crude matter.
source: Star Wars: Episode V - The Empire Strikes Back
context: Reminder of the spiritual or energetic nature of beings beyond the physical body.

text: You must unlearn what you have learned.
source: Star Wars: Episode V - The Empire Strikes Back
context: The necessity of shedding preconceptions and ego to truly learn and grow.
